---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<style>
.gasshuku-quickfacts {
  background: #f4f1ea;
  border: 1px solid #ddd6c8;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}
.gasshuku-quickfacts h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #6b6255;
}
.gasshuku-quickfacts dl {
  margin: 0;
}
.gasshuku-quickfacts dt {
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}
.gasshuku-quickfacts dt:first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}
.gasshuku-quickfacts dd {
  margin-left: 0;
  color: #333;
}
.gasshuku-register-btn {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
  background: #a3372f;
  color: #fff !important;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: bold;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.gasshuku-register-btn:hover {
  background: #8a2d26;
}
.gasshuku-sidebar-sticky {
  position: sticky;
  top: 1.5rem;
}
.gasshuku-jumpnav {
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd6c8;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd6c8;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
.gasshuku-jumpnav a {
  margin-right: 1rem;
}
.gasshuku-schedule-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin: 0.5rem 0 1.5rem;
}
.gasshuku-schedule-table th,
.gasshuku-schedule-table td {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd6c8;
}
.gasshuku-schedule-table th {
  color: #6b6255;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
</style>

<div class="gasshuku-layout">
  <div class="gasshuku-text">

    <h1>CAF Annual Gasshuku Comes to the Midwest!</h1>

    <p>
      The <a href="https://www.capitalaikidoblog.com"><strong>Capital Aikido Federation</strong></a>
      <strong>Annual Training Intensive</strong> is coming to the Midwest—and
      <a href="/">Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin</a> is honored to host,
      <strong>September 25–27</strong>.
    </p>

    <p>
      This is a big moment for our community. CAoW is one of the Federation's
      newest dojos, and we're excited (and a little awed) to welcome friends
      from across the region and beyond for a weekend of focused training, good
      energy, and shared practice.
    </p>

    <nav class="gasshuku-jumpnav" aria-label="Page sections">
      <a href="#schedule">Schedule</a>
      <a href="#registration">Registration</a>
      <a href="#lodging">Lodging</a>
      <a href="#questions">Contact</a>
    </nav>

    <h2>What to expect</h2>

    <ul>
      <li><strong>High-quality Aikido training</strong> in a supportive,
      serious-but-friendly atmosphere</li>
      <li><strong>A gathering of friends</strong> —a chance to reconnect with
      familiar faces and meet new training partners</li>
      <li><strong>A Midwest milestone</strong> for the CAF Annual Intensive,
      hosted in Wisconsin</li>
    </ul>

    <h2>Everyone is welcome</h2>

    <p>
      Whether you're a long-time CAF member or visiting from another
      affiliation, <strong>all ranks and backgrounds are welcome</strong>.
      Bring your curiosity, your ukemi, and your best training spirit.
    </p>

    <h2>Teaching roster</h2>

    <p>
      Classes will be led by senior CAF yudansha. A full roster of instructors
      will be announced closer to the event.
    </p>

    <h2 id="schedule">Schedule</h2>

    <table class="gasshuku-schedule-table">
      <thead>
        <tr><th>Day</th><th>Time</th><th>Session</th></tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>Friday, Sept 25</td><td>7:00–8:00 pm</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td></td><td>8:00–9:00 pm</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Saturday, Sept 26</td><td>10:00–11:00 am</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td></td><td>11:00 am–12:00 pm</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td></td><td>3:00–4:00 pm</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td></td><td>4:00–5:00 pm</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Sunday, Sept 27</td><td>10:00–11:00 am</td><td>Class</td></tr>
        <tr><td></td><td>11:00 am–12:00 pm</td><td>Class</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <h2>Additional activities</h2>

    <ul>
      <li><strong>Friday night out</strong> — drinks and apps at a local
      establishment after evening classes</li>
      <li><strong>Saturday breakfast</strong> — join us early at a local
      diner before morning classes</li>
      <li><strong>Saturday dinner</strong> — catered at the dojo, included
      with Saturday-only or whole-weekend registration</li>
    </ul>

    <h2 id="registration">Registration</h2>

    <ul>
      <li>Whole weekend — $150</li>
      <li>Friday only — $75</li>
      <li>Saturday only — $100</li>
      <li>Sunday only — $75</li>
    </ul>

    <p>
      <a class="gasshuku-register-btn" href="https://forms.gle/a5oWRGNUjWFPvDhu6">Register here</a>
      Please register ahead of time if you can — it helps us plan classes,
      food, and space, and makes sure we're ready to welcome you properly.
    </p>

    <h2 id="lodging">Lodging</h2>

    <p>
      We've reserved a discounted room block (with late checkout) at the
      AmericInn by Wyndham Janesville. Book through our group block using
      <a href="https://www.wyndhamhotels.com/americinn/janesville-wisconsin/americinn-janesville/rooms-rates?brand_id=AA&checkInDate=9/25/2026&checkOutDate=9/27/2026&useWRPoints=false&children=0&groupCode=CAOW&iata=00093763&adults=1&rooms=1&referringBrand=WR&cid=PS:o4yvfbuy02xlxdi&loc=ChIJ2zkiTZIXBogRwL7NH3a0-ws&sessionId=1771353691">this link</a>,
      or call 608-371-9981 and reference group code CAOW. The discounted rate
      is available until August 25th. You can reserve now and pay at the hotel.
    </p>

    <h2 id="questions">Questions?</h2>

    <p>
      Reach out to us at
      <a href="mailto:info@aikidoofwisconsin.com">info@aikidoofwisconsin.com</a>.
    </p>

    <p><strong>We can't wait to train with you!</strong></p>

  </div>
  <div class="gasshuku-flyer">
    <div class="gasshuku-sidebar-sticky">
      <img src="../assets/images/2026-gasshuku.png"
           alt="CAF 2026 Gasshuku — September 25–27, Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin">

      <div class="gasshuku-quickfacts">
        <h3>At a glance</h3>
        <dl>
          <dt>Dates</dt>
          <dd>September 25–27, 2026</dd>
          <dt>Cost</dt>
          <dd>$75–$150</dd>
        </dl>
        <a class="gasshuku-register-btn" href="https://forms.gle/a5oWRGNUjWFPvDhu6">Register now</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
